Name: CAMERA_GPAPPLER_PARAM
Description: Defines parameters relating to the camera during grab states.

Fields.Name: Camera Behavior Type
Fields.Description: The behavior to use for this camera.

Fields.Name: Camera Reference Point Type
Fields.Description: The reference point to use for this camera.

Fields.Name: Match Initial Orientation to Original
Fields.Description: If enabled, this camera matches its orientation to the original source camera.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Type: Transition Start
Fields.Description: The interpolation type at the start of switching.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Type: Transition End
Fields.Description: The interpolation type at the end of switching.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Type: Camera Start
Fields.Description: The interpolation type for camera start.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Type: Camera End
Fields.Description: The interpolation type for camera end.

Fields.Name: Ray Hit Processing Type
Fields.Description: The ray hit processing type, used for camera collisions.

Fields.Name: Sphere Hit Processing Type
Fields.Description: The sphere hit processing type, used for camera collisions.

Fields.Name: Selection Type
Fields.Description: The branching decision type when multiple exist.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Time: Transition Start
Fields.Description: The interpolation time (in seconds) at the start of switching.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Time: Transition End
Fields.Description: The interpolation time (in seconds) at the end of switching.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Time: Camera Start
Fields.Description: The interpolation time (in seconds) at camera start.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Time: Camera End
Fields.Description: The interpolation time (in seconds) at camera end.

Fields.Name: Ray Width
Fields.Description: The thickness of the camera ray.

Fields.Name: Sphere Width
Fields.Description: The thickness of the camera sphere.
